news.title:
Vishal Mega Mart grants 5L stock options under 2019 ESOP at Rs.117 per option.
Each option converts to 1 equity share of Rs.10 face value, exercisable in 10 years.
news.summary:
Vishal Mega Mart grants 5L stock options under 2019 ESOP at Rs.117 per option.
Each option converts to 1 equity share of Rs.10 face value, exercisable in 10 years.

news.title: Government of Singapore bought 126.9M shares of Vishal Mega Mart at ₹117.
news.summary: Government of Singapore bought 126.9M shares of Vishal Mega Mart at ₹117.

news.title:
Vishal Mega Mart sees bulk share purchases from HDFC Mutual Fund.
The Singapore Government and MAS also participated in the purchases.
news.summary:
Vishal Mega Mart sees bulk share purchases from HDFC Mutual Fund.
The Singapore Government and MAS also participated in the purchases.

news.title:
Vishal Mega's stock weight to increase by $23M (Rs 2.09B) in MSCI February rejig.
The weight adjustment will take effect today at 3 pm.
news.summary:
Vishal Mega's stock weight to increase by $23M (Rs 2.09B) in MSCI February rejig.
The weight adjustment will take effect today at 3 pm.

news.title:
Vishal Mega Mart promoter executes a big block deal, selling 825M stake.
The transaction puts Vishal Mega Mart stock in focus in business news.
news.summary:
Vishal Mega Mart promoter executes a big block deal, selling 825M stake.
The transaction puts Vishal Mega Mart stock in focus in business news.

news.title:
Samayat Services plans to sell 6.5% stake in Vishal Mega Mart via block deal.
Offer size is ₹3,507.5 crore at a floor price of ₹115/share.
news.summary:
Samayat Services plans to sell 6.5% stake in Vishal Mega Mart via block deal.
Offer size is ₹3,507.5 crore at a floor price of ₹115/share.

news.title: Vishal Mega Mart saw 7.78M shares traded in a block at Rs 127.7.
news.summary: Vishal Mega Mart saw 7.78M shares traded in a block at Rs 127.7.

news.title:
Vishal Mega Mart Ltd informs NSE and BSE about scheduled investor meetings in Mumbai on Feb 23-24, 2026.
Meetings include Kotak's Chasing Growth 2026 and IIFL's 17th Enterprising India Global Investors Conference.
news.summary:
Vishal Mega Mart Ltd informs NSE and BSE about scheduled investor meetings in Mumbai on Feb 23-24, 2026.
Meetings include Kotak's Chasing Growth 2026 and IIFL's 17th Enterprising India Global Investors Conference.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley retains Overweight rating on Vishal Mega Mart citing robust store growth.
Firm highlights consistent margins despite revenue shortfall.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley retains Overweight rating on Vishal Mega Mart citing robust store growth.
Firm highlights consistent margins despite revenue shortfall.

news.title:
Vishal Mega Mart Ltd's board approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025.
Standalone revenue for Q3 stood at Rs 15,901.4M, net profit at Rs 1,815M. Consolidated results also disclosed.
news.summary:
Vishal Mega Mart Ltd's board approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 31, 2025.
Standalone revenue for Q3 stood at Rs 15,901.4M, net profit at Rs 1,815M. Consolidated results also disclosed.

news.title:
Vishal Mega Mart's board to meet on Jan 27, 2026, to approve Q3 FY25 financial results.
Trading window remains closed from Jan 1, 2026, until 48 hours post-results announcement.
news.summary:
Vishal Mega Mart's board to meet on Jan 27, 2026, to approve Q3 FY25 financial results.
Trading window remains closed from Jan 1, 2026, until 48 hours post-results announcement.

news.title:
Vishal Mega Mart Ltd's VP of Supply Chain, S Raamesh, resigns effective January 9, 2026.
Resignation attributed to personal reasons; detailed disclosures provided as per SEBI guidelines.
news.summary:
Vishal Mega Mart Ltd's VP of Supply Chain, S Raamesh, resigns effective January 9, 2026.
Resignation attributed to personal reasons; detailed disclosures provided as per SEBI guidelines.

news.title:
Vishal Mega Mart's subsidiary faces Rs 16.3M tax demand and Rs 1.6M penalty for FY 2021-22.
The subsidiary is reviewing the order with no operational impact on the parent company.
news.summary:
Vishal Mega Mart's subsidiary faces Rs 16.3M tax demand and Rs 1.6M penalty for FY 2021-22.
The subsidiary is reviewing the order with no operational impact on the parent company.

news.title:
MOFSL retains Buy rating on Vishal Mega Mart, target now Rs 170.
Target price revised from Rs 180 to Rs 170.
news.summary:
MOFSL retains Buy rating on Vishal Mega Mart, target now Rs 170.
Target price revised from Rs 180 to Rs 170.

news.title:
Vishal Mega Mart faces tax demand of ₹6.7 crore, penalty ₹6.7 crore, interest ₹1.1 lakh.
Total financial impact is ₹13.5 crore; company reports no operational impact, reviewing next steps.
news.summary:
Vishal Mega Mart faces tax demand of ₹6.7 crore, penalty ₹6.7 crore, interest ₹1.1 lakh.
Total financial impact is ₹13.5 crore; company reports no operational impact, reviewing next steps.

news.title:
Vishal Mega Mart Ltd announces an analyst/investor meet on Dec 2, 2025, at Gurugram.
Organized by Motilal Oswal Financial Services, no UPSI will be shared during the meeting.
news.summary:
Vishal Mega Mart Ltd announces an analyst/investor meet on Dec 2, 2025, at Gurugram.
Organized by Motilal Oswal Financial Services, no UPSI will be shared during the meeting.

news.title:
Kedaara Capital may sell its stake in Vishal Mega Mart at a discount.
This signals potential ownership changes for the retail company.
news.summary:
Kedaara Capital may sell its stake in Vishal Mega Mart at a discount.
This signals potential ownership changes for the retail company.

news.title:
Vishal Mega Mart Ltd uploaded the audio recording of its earnings call for Q2 and H1 FY25 on its website.
The earnings call, held on Nov 14, 2025, discussed financial results for the period ending Sep 30, 2025.
news.summary:
Vishal Mega Mart Ltd uploaded the audio recording of its earnings call for Q2 and H1 FY25 on its website.
The earnings call, held on Nov 14, 2025, discussed financial results for the period ending Sep 30, 2025.

news.title:
Vishal Mega Mart targets 1,200+ stores by FY28, focusing on Tier-II/III cities.
The company aims for 25%+ revenue CAGR, margin growth, and digital channel enhancement.
news.summary:
Vishal Mega Mart targets 1,200+ stores by FY28, focusing on Tier-II/III cities.
The company aims for 25%+ revenue CAGR, margin growth, and digital channel enhancement.

news.title:
Vishal Mega Mart's Q2 EBITDA drops to ₹3.95B vs ₹4.59B QoQ.
EBITDA margin declines to 13.2% from 14.6% QoQ.
news.summary:
Vishal Mega Mart's Q2 EBITDA drops to ₹3.95B vs ₹4.59B QoQ.
EBITDA margin declines to 13.2% from 14.6% QoQ.
